name: Amber Meadows
description: Come play pickleball at Amber Meadows in Frederick, MD! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Baker Park
description: Baker Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Frederick, MD. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Deer Crossing Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Deer Crossing Rec Center in New Market, MD! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Dill Dinkers - Frederick
description: Dill Dinkers - Frederick is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Frederick, MD. There are 7 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, trainers or lessons, and a pro shop or equipment store.
fees:
Fee required — COURT FEES AND OPEN PLAY
COURT FEES
Member – $7.50/person/hour – $30.00 min.
Visitors – $15.00/person/hour – $60.00 min.
OPEN PLAY (generally a 2-hour session)
Member – $7.50/person/ses
